title: B.Sc in Anaesthesia and Operation Theatre Technology
content: The minimum age should be 17 years as on December 31st of each Admission Year. (Medical fitness certificate is mandatory to submit and it is to be endorsed by Government Medical Officer) The minimum age should be 17 years as on December 31st of each Admission Year.
